name: Chili Dogs
recipeIngredient: 1 pound kidney beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion; cook until tender.
3. Stir in garlic (if using) and cook another minute.
4. Add oil, kidney beans, and tomato sauce to the pan. Stir well.
5. Mix in chili powder and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Preheat the hot dogs and buns in a toaster oven or under a broiler until heated through.
7. Place each hot dog in a bun.
8. Spoon some of the bean mixture onto the hot dogs, then top with tomato sauce.
9. Sprinkle shredded cheese and chopped onions over the topping.
10. Serve immediately.
